docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,058.00 FILED BY WONG JOHN C., M.D. ORTHOPAEDIC HAND SURGERY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG KING MRS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG KING MRS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG JOHN C., M.D. ORTHOPAEDIC HAND SURGERY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEUNG KING MRS. $3,058.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,087.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR WONG JOHN C., M.D. ORTHOPAEDIC HAND SURGERY ASSIGNED TO AMERICAN WEST COLLECTIONS
